steps: ### 🔑 Critical Next Steps for Your Team
test_cases.environment:
| **FC-03** | Session timeout enforces re-authentication | Functional | 1. Log in successfully
2. Wait `[Session Timeout Duration]` (e.g., 15 min)
3. Perform any protected action (e.g., load profile page) | User redirected to login page; session invalidated; no access to protected resources | High | Configurable session timeout; clock-synchronized test environment |
